name: SYS 03 — Proposal and Contract Delivery
description: Webhook on Proposal Stage: Claude generates proposal body → branded HTML/PDF template → html2pdf → Drive upload → Proposals sheet row (Pending Review) → Chat alert → poll Sheets every 30min until Approved → client email + HubSpot proposal_sent_date + Log.

parameters.content:
## SYS 03 — Proposal and Contract Delivery

### Purpose
Generate a **client-ready proposal PDF** from HubSpot deal data: AI-written body + **fixed branded template** (hero, snapshot, pricing, pain callout), then **human-in-the-loop** via the **Proposals** tab before the client ever gets email.

### What this workflow does *not* do
It does **not** auto-send the proposal immediately. The client email runs only after **Status = Approved** in Sheets. **Contract PDFs** are generated by **SYS 03 — Contract Generation** (Contract Sent stage); **e-sign** is still your process (DocuSign, HubSpot quotes, etc.). Requires **`client_drive_folder_id`** on the deal for upload.

### When it fires
- **Webhook:** `POST` → `/webhook/hubspot-deal-proposal-stage`
- **HubSpot:** Deal enters **Proposal Stage** (direct workflow, or **SYS 00** router on `dealstage`).

### How it works (flow)
1. **Get Config** → **Extract Deal Data** (tier from CONFIG, pain points, contact, `driveFolderId`, amounts).
2. **Prep Claude Prompt** → **Call Claude API** (Anthropic) → **Parse** response.
3. **Prep PDF Input** — wraps body in full HTML/CSS **print template** (do not redesign this layout without explicit approval).
4. **Call PDF Service** (`html2pdf.fly.dev`) → **Ensure PDF Item** → **Upload to Drive** (deal folder).
5. **Add to Proposals Queue** (Google Sheets **Proposals** tab, status **Pending Review**).
6. **Send Alert** (Google Chat — link + approve instruction) → **Wait 30min** → **Check Approval Status** → **Approved?** If not, loop wait/poll; if **Approved**, **Send Proposal Email** (sub-workflow).
7. **Update Deal** — sets **`proposal_sent_date`** in HubSpot → **Log** (`proposal_sent`).

### Dependencies
CONFIG, **Anthropic** (HTTP Header Auth), **Google Drive** & **Google Sheets**, **Send Email** / **Send Google Chat Alert** / **Log** sub-workflows (set **Execute Workflow** IDs: Alert + Log may be empty in export).

**Insights:** **Track Time Saved** after **Log to Sheet** — **177 min** once per run. In workflow **Settings**, set **Estimated time saved** to **Dynamic (uses time saved nodes)** (not stored in this JSON so import stays compatible).

### Ops
Confirm **masterSheetId** and **Proposals** sheet columns match `docs/google-sheets-setup.md`. Match HubSpot internal names for `proposal_sent_date`. Keep PDF template structure per team **proposal-pdf-template-lock** rule.

## Time saved (labor) — per proposal run

**Unit:** one execution from **Proposal Stage webhook** through **client proposal email sent** (after **Approved** in Sheets).

**Definition:** *Labor* = hands-on human minutes. *Clock* = wall time (e.g. **Wait 30min** polling) — not counted as labor below.

### Manual baseline (same outcome, no SYS 03 — Proposal and Contract Delivery)

| # | Task | min |
|---|------|-----|
| 1 | Pull deal + contact fields from HubSpot into working notes | 10 |
| 2 | Draft full proposal body (sections per prompt: exec summary → next steps, pain-aware) | 90 |
| 3 | Lay out in branded print-ready doc (hero, snapshot, pricing, pain block, body — comparable to template) | 45 |
| 4 | PDF export + pagination / print QA | 12 |
| 5 | Upload PDF to correct **client Drive folder**, consistent filename | 8 |
| 6 | Append **Proposals** sheet row (date, client, tier, link, status) | 5 |
| 7 | Notify team with Drive link (Chat / equivalent) | 3 |
| 8 | When ready to release: compose + send **client email** with link | 10 |
| 9 | Set HubSpot **`proposal_sent_date`** | 3 |
| 10 | Log run to **automations log** sheet | 4 |

**Manual total** = **190 min** (~3.2 h)

### With SYS 05 (human only)

| # | Task | min |
|---|------|-----|
| A | QC generated PDF + sheet row (accuracy, client name, pricing) | 12 |
| B | Set **Status** → **Approved** in **Proposals** | 1 |

**Human total** = **13 min**  
*(Email to client, HubSpot date, Chat alert, Drive upload, PDF generation, and log are automated.)*

### Net

**Time saved** = 190 − 13 = **177 min** ≈ **3.0 h labor** saved **per approved proposal**.

Adjust line items if your real manual drafting or layout time differs; update **Manual total** and recompute **190 − 13**.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: $json.maxTokens, system: $json.systemPrompt, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.userPrompt }] }) }}

value.Drive Link: ={{ $('Upload to Drive').first()?.json?.id ? 'https://drive.google.com/file/d/' + $('Upload to Drive').first().json.id : ($('Upload to Drive').first()?.json?.data?.id ? 'https://drive.google.com/file/d/' + $('Upload to Drive').first().json.data.id : '') }}
